video_prompt: style: Cinematic Realism v1, mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting, color palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. cinematic live-action video shot. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. character (charA_v1): short_black, white_hoodie + black_jeans, silver_ring_left_hand. Lin Che descends into a basement area., He sees a mirror covered with a cloth., From behind the cloth, the sound of fingernails tapping glass is heard. Narration: "In the basement, a mirror is covered with cloth. From behind it comes the sound of fingernails tapping glass.". Protagonist A says: "Who's in there?". Camera motion: medium shot, subtle hand-held camera feel, focus on subject action. Wide shot of a dimly lit basement, Lin Che standing before a cloth-covered mirror, eerie atmosphere, single light source casting shadows, suspenseful composition. Character identity locked to reference images. No face morphing or outfit variation.. Scene layout locked to context reference frame. Do not reposition props or alter lighting source.. Camera transition smooth from previous shot continuity frame. No abrupt jump cut between shots. Stable visual consistency across entire clip. No character drift, no prop mutation, no scene layout shift.

workflow.tool_instructions: No keyframes found yet. Generate keyframe images first using build-image-prompts, save them to S034/keyframes, then re-run this compiler for img2vid conditioning. Text-to-video is still possible with just 'video_prompt'.
